what_was_done: Toroidal Teams v1 complete — all 3 phases reviewed, committed (4 commits on Toroidal-teams). Phase 3 review passed. Disabled model-router, analytics, skills, search MCPs (only memory remains). Cleaned up settings.local.json. Saved v2 pre-plan to memory (id:251438e166e050c4). Researched disler repos (agent-sandbox-skill, hooks-multi-agent-observability, multi-agent-postgres, hooks-mastery) — none would have changed our design. Pi agent review: result-write contract is weakest link, tmux paste race mitigated, co-claim foreknowledge partially valid.
known_issues: Gate 19 cascade on branch switch (low priority — anti-cascade limit handles it)

last_response_preview:
Good find — Gastown is Steve Yegge's framework. Here's the comparison:

---

## Toroidal Teams vs Gas Town

| Dimension | **Toroidal Teams** (ours) | **Gas Town** (Yegge) |
|---|---|---|
| **Scale** | Few focused agents (1-5) | 12–30 parallel agents |
| **Roles** | Role-typed agents (researcher, etc.) | Mayor / Polecats / Witness / Deacon / Refinery |
| **Orchestration** | Main session + watcher script | Dedicated Mayor agent |
